lever_summary: Dense multi-dim broadcast comparison. The comparison.rs Tensor<>Tensor non-same-shape branch ran per-element compare_literals with a flat_to_multi decode over Vec<Literal>, with no f64/i64 broadcast-compare fast path. Reuse the shared BroadcastOdometer (now pub(crate)) to gather both source offsets incrementally from contiguous as_f64_slice()/as_i64_slice() backings, applying float_cmp/int_cmp directly. Bool output (no dense Bool storage).

alien_graveyard.primitive: incremental index odometer + dense SoA gather (applied to comparison broadcast)
alien_graveyard.mapping: reuse the pass71 arithmetic BroadcastOdometer in the comparison path so masking/where-style broadcast comparisons skip the per-element multi-index decode and Literal materialization

method: Same-worker comparison on ts2: dense (new_*_values / vector_*) inputs vs Vec<Literal>-backed reference benches run in the same process. The literal references exercise the prior fully-generic compare_literals broadcast loop (neither f64 nor i64 had a broadcast-compare fast path).
command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- lt_broadcast_256 --save-baseline bcmp

change.lever: Made BroadcastOdometer (struct + new + next) pub(crate) in arithmetic.rs. comparison.rs broadcast branch gains leading dense i64 then dense f64 odometer tiers before the generic compare_literals loop; both fall back when operands are not dense typed storage.

isomorphism.ordering: unchanged: output produced in the same ascending row-major flat order; the odometer reproduces broadcast_flat_index(flat_to_multi(flat), strides) for both operands (broadcast-aware strides 0 on broadcast axes)
isomorphism.comparison_op: unchanged: for F64xF64 compare_literals falls to float_cmp(as_f64, as_f64) and for I64xI64 to int_cmp(i128::from, i128::from); the dense tiers apply exactly those closures to the gathered values, so NaN / +-inf / signed-zero results are identical
isomorphism.output_dtype: Bool tensor, identical to the generic path
isomorphism.errors: dense tiers fire only when both operands expose as_f64_slice()/as_i64_slice(); Literal-backed / mixed / complex / promoting cases fall back to the unchanged generic compare_literals broadcast loop

validation.name: dense_broadcast_compare_parity
validation.result: passed: 1053 tests incl new dense_broadcast_compare_bit_identical_to_literal_path (4 broadcast shapes x 6 comparisons, f64 with NaN/inf/signed-zero + i64)

validation.name: clippy_deny_warnings
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
